name: Black Bean & Vegetable Burrito
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat a little olive oil in a pan over medium heat.
2. Add the julienned yellow bell pepper and red bell pepper, stirring until just barely tender.
3. Add the sliced mushrooms and corn to the pan, stirring until they have a nice color.
4. Stir in the carrot once it has softened.
5. Add the brown sugar, chili powder, cumin, and salt to the pan. Stir well to combine.
6. Pour in the balsamic vinegar and deglaze the pan by scraping up any browned bits from the bottom.
7. If necessary, add a splash of water depending on how much moisture is present in the vegetables and your preferred level of chili powder.
8. Add the drained black beans to the pan and heat through until all ingredients are evenly warmed.
9. Microwave the tortillas for 45 seconds covered with a damp paper towel to soften them slightly.
10. Assemble the burritos by filling the tortillas with the cooked mixture, then serve with salsa and sour cream if desired.
